mapper.sql: id, title, description, venue, cover_image_url, event_time, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO events (id, title, description, venue, cover_image_url, event_time, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{venue}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{eventTime}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE events SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, venue = #{venue}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, event_time = #{eventTime}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM events
ORDER BY event_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM events ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
